content.text:
OpenClaw Army is a hierarchical 16-agent orchestration system with King AI at the top, managers (Alpha, Beta, Gamma) coordinating specialized worker pools, and shared services including memory, permission broker, and a meta-orchestrator workflow engine. Agents communicate via sessions_send and adhere to strict approval-based permission elevation.

(50 words)
